homepage.heroSubline: Transforming homes in Philadelphia and beyond. Trust Milestone Construction & Restoration for quality craftsmanship and lasting value.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Trust, Driven by Quality
aboutText: Milestone Construction & Restoration started with a simple goal: to provide homeowners in Philadelphia with reliable and exceptional remodeling services. We've grown from a small team to a trusted name, known for our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction.

Our approach is straightforward: listen to our clients, understand their vision, and execute with precision. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and a dedication to exceeding expectations on every project, big or small.

We're proud to be a part of the Philadelphia community. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support local initiatives. We believe in building lasting relationships with our clients and contributing to the vibrancy of our city.

valueProps.title: Expert Craftsmanship
valueProps.description: Skilled professionals delivering quality results that stand the test of time.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: Clear and upfront estimates with no hidden fees or surprises.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Deep understanding of Philadelphia's unique housing styles and building codes.

valueProps.title: Dedicated Support
valueProps.description: Responsive and reliable customer service throughout your project.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact Milestone Construction & Restoration today for a free consultation and estimate.

services.name: Kitchen Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Revitalize your kitchen with our expert remodeling services.
services.description:
The kitchen is the heart of your home. Milestone Construction & Restoration specializes in creating functional and beautiful kitchens tailored to your needs and style. From minor updates to complete overhauls, we handle every aspect of your kitchen remodel with precision and care.

We start with a detailed design consultation, considering your lifestyle, cooking habits, and aesthetic preferences. We offer a wide range of options, including custom cabinetry, countertop installation, flooring upgrades, appliance integration, and lighting solutions. Our team is experienced in working with Philadelphia's diverse housing stock, from historic row homes to modern condos.

We understand the importance of minimizing disruption during the remodeling process. Our team works efficiently and respectfully, ensuring a clean and safe work environment. We handle all necessary permits and inspections, providing you with a seamless and stress-free experience. We ensure the project stays on budget and on schedule.

faq.question: How long does a kitchen remodel typically take?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the scope of the project, but most kitchen remodels take between 4-8 weeks. We provide a detailed schedule during the initial consultation.

faq.question: Do I need to move out during the remodel?
faq.answer: It's usually possible to remain in your home during a kitchen remodel, but it can be disruptive. We take measures to minimize dust and noise and maintain a clean work area.

faq.question: What permits are required for a kitchen remodel in Philadelphia?
faq.answer: Permit requirements depend on the extent of the work. We handle all necessary permit applications and ensure compliance with local building codes.

services.name: Bathroom Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your bathroom into a spa-like retreat.
services.description:
Milestone Construction & Restoration offers comprehensive bathroom remodeling services, creating functional and stylish spaces tailored to your needs. Whether you're looking to update fixtures, reconfigure the layout, or create a luxurious master bath, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life.

We specialize in working with the unique challenges of Philadelphia's older homes, including limited space and outdated plumbing. Our team is skilled in tile installation, shower and tub replacements, vanity upgrades, and lighting design. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a durable and beautiful result.

We understand the importance of proper ventilation and waterproofing in bathrooms. We take extra care to prevent moisture damage and ensure long-lasting performance. Our team will work directly with you every step of the way, from initial design to the final touches.

faq.question: How much does a bathroom remodel cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a bathroom remodel varies depending on the size, scope, and materials used. We provide a detailed estimate after the initial consultation.

faq.question: Can you help with design ideas for my small bathroom?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We have experience maximizing space in small bathrooms and can offer creative design solutions.

faq.question: What type of ventilation is recommended for a bathroom?
faq.answer: Proper ventilation is crucial to prevent moisture damage. We typically recommend installing a high-quality exhaust fan vented to the outside.

services.name: Basement Finishing
services.shortDescription: Maximize your living space with our basement finishing services.
services.description:
Unlock the potential of your basement with Milestone Construction & Restoration's professional finishing services. We transform unfinished basements into functional and comfortable living areas, adding value and square footage to your home.

Our team handles all aspects of basement finishing, including framing, insulation, drywall, flooring, and electrical and plumbing work. We pay close attention to moisture control and ventilation to ensure a healthy and comfortable environment. We are familiar with Philadelphia's unique basement conditions and can address any challenges, such as low ceilings or dampness.

Whether you envision a home theater, a playroom, a home office, or an extra bedroom, we can create a custom basement design that meets your needs and budget. We handle all necessary permits and inspections, ensuring compliance with local building codes.

faq.question: Is it worth finishing my basement?
faq.answer: Finishing your basement is a great way to add value and living space to your home. It can significantly increase your property value.

faq.question: How do I prevent moisture problems in my basement?
faq.answer: Proper waterproofing and ventilation are essential. We use moisture-resistant materials and ensure adequate ventilation to prevent moisture buildup.

faq.question: What permits are required for basement finishing in Philadelphia?
faq.answer: Permits are typically required for basement finishing. We handle all necessary permit applications and inspections.

services.name: Roofing Services
services.shortDescription: Protect your home with our comprehensive roofing solutions.
services.description:
Milestone Construction & Restoration provides expert roofing services, including repairs, replacements, and installations. We understand the importance of a strong and reliable roof in protecting your home from the elements, especially the harsh winters and severe weather common in Philadelphia.

We work with a variety of roofing materials, including asphalt shingles, slate, and metal roofing. Our team is experienced in working on Philadelphia's diverse architectural styles, from historic row homes to modern buildings. We provide thorough inspections to identify potential problems and offer cost-effective solutions.

Whether you need a minor repair or a complete roof replacement, we use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a durable and long-lasting result. We are committed to providing exceptional customer service and exceeding your expectations.
process: Step 4: Installation of New Roofing System

faq.question: How do I know if I need a new roof?
faq.answer: Signs of a failing roof include leaks, missing shingles, and excessive granule loss. We offer free roof inspections to assess the condition of your roof.

faq.question: How long does a new roof last?
faq.answer: The lifespan of a roof depends on the materials used and the quality of installation. Asphalt shingles typically last 20-30 years, while slate and metal roofs can last much longer.

faq.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faq.answer: Yes, we are fully licensed and insured for your protection and peace of mind.

services.name: Masonry Restoration
services.shortDescription: Preserve the beauty and integrity of your brickwork.
services.description:
Milestone Construction & Restoration specializes in masonry restoration for Philadelphia's historic buildings and homes. We understand the unique challenges of maintaining brick and stone structures in a climate with freeze-thaw cycles and heavy rainfall. Our team has the expertise to repair and restore damaged masonry, preserving its beauty and structural integrity.

We offer a range of masonry services, including brick repointing, crack repair, stone replacement, and chimney restoration. We use traditional techniques and high-quality materials to ensure a seamless and durable repair. We are committed to preserving the historical character of Philadelphia's architectural heritage.

From small repairs to large-scale restoration projects, we provide exceptional craftsmanship and attention to detail. We work closely with homeowners and property managers to develop customized solutions that meet their needs and budget. We understand the nuances of Philadelphia's rowhomes and the importance of matching existing materials.

faq.question: Why is masonry restoration important in Philadelphia?
faq.answer: Philadelphia's historic buildings are susceptible to damage from freeze-thaw cycles and pollution. Masonry restoration helps preserve these structures for future generations.

faq.question: What is brick repointing?
faq.answer: Repointing is the process of removing and replacing damaged mortar between bricks. It helps prevent water damage and maintain the structural integrity of the wall.

faq.question: How do you match the existing mortar?
faq.answer: We carefully analyze the existing mortar and use a custom blend to match its color and texture.

services.name: Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Enhance your home's curb appeal and protection with new siding.
services.description:
Milestone Construction & Restoration offers professional siding installation services, providing homeowners in Philadelphia with durable and attractive siding options. New siding can dramatically improve your home's curb appeal, protect it from the elements, and increase its energy efficiency.

We work with a variety of siding materials, including vinyl, wood, and fiber cement. Our team is experienced in installing siding on Philadelphia's diverse architectural styles, from row homes to Victorian twins. We provide expert guidance to help you choose the best siding option for your needs and budget.

We pay close attention to detail during the installation process, ensuring a seamless and weather-tight fit. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a long-lasting and beautiful result. We are committed to providing exceptional customer service and exceeding your expectations.

faq.question: What are the benefits of new siding?
faq.answer: New siding can improve your home's appearance, protect it from the elements, increase its energy efficiency, and increase its value.

faq.question: What type of siding is best for my home?
faq.answer: The best type of siding depends on your budget, aesthetic preferences, and the architectural style of your home. We can help you choose the right option.

faq.question: How long does siding installation take?
faq.answer: The timeline for siding installation depends on the size of your home and the type of siding being installed. We provide a detailed schedule during the initial consultation.

serviceAreas.content:
Milestone Construction & Restoration is proud to offer comprehensive home remodeling services throughout Philadelphia. From historic row homes in South Philly to modern apartments in Center City, we understand the unique architectural styles and challenges that Philadelphia homeowners face. Our team of experienced professionals is dedicated to providing top-quality craftsmanship and exceptional customer service, ensuring your remodeling project is a stress-free and enjoyable experience.

We specialize in kitchen and bathroom renovations, basement finishing, whole-home remodels, and more. Whether you're looking to update your outdated kitchen, create a luxurious spa-like bathroom, or add valuable living space to your home, Milestone Construction & Restoration has the expertise and resources to bring your vision to life. We use only the finest materials and employ proven construction techniques to ensure lasting results that you'll be proud of for years to come.
serviceAreas.localContext: Philadelphia, steeped in history, features diverse neighborhoods each with their own distinct character and architectural styles, requiring a nuanced approach to remodeling.

serviceAreas.content:
Milestone Construction & Restoration extends its expert remodeling services to Upper Darby, PA. We're familiar with the diverse housing stock in Upper Darby, from classic colonial homes to newer construction. Whether you're looking to update a single room or transform your entire home, our team is equipped to handle all your remodeling needs. We prioritize clear communication and attention to detail, ensuring your project is completed on time and within budget.

We offer a wide range of services including kitchen and bathroom renovations, basement finishing, and home additions. Our goal is to create spaces that are both functional and beautiful, reflecting your personal style and enhancing your lifestyle. We're committed to using sustainable practices and energy-efficient materials whenever possible, helping you create a more comfortable and environmentally friendly home.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Milestone Construction did an outstanding job remodeling my kitchen! They were professional, efficient, and the quality of their work is exceptional. I highly recommend them to anyone looking to update their home.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We hired Milestone to remodel our master bathroom, and we're very pleased with the results. There were a couple of minor hiccups along the way, but they addressed them quickly and professionally. The finished product is beautiful!

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: Milestone Construction transformed our unfinished basement into a fantastic family room. The team was knowledgeable, courteous, and always kept us informed throughout the project. We couldn't be happier!

reviews.name: Michael P.
reviews.text: After a bad storm, we needed our roof repaired quickly. Milestone Construction responded promptly and did an excellent job fixing the damage. Their prices were fair, and their service was top-notch.

reviews.name: Emily S.
reviews.text: Milestone Construction did a great job restoring the brick facade on our old row home in Fishtown. They were careful to match the existing brick and mortar, and the finished product looks seamless. The crew was always on time and respectful of our property.

reviews.name: Tom B.
reviews.text: We hired Milestone to completely renovate our kitchen in our West Philly Victorian. It was a big job involving moving walls and completely redoing the electrical and plumbing. They handled everything with professionalism and skill. The design team helped us create a kitchen that is both beautiful and functional. Highly recommended!
